title: Prompt Compression
content:
# Interview Prep: Prompt Compression

## Q1: Why is a smaller language model (e.g. GPT-2) reliable for calculating compression thresholds for larger models?

### Standard Answer
Text redundancy and grammatical predictability are highly correlated across language models. A smaller model can identify repetitive phrases, filler words, and predictable structures. The remaining high-information tokens map well to the reasoning capabilities of larger models.
